message:
test(unit): expand vector_index (13→37) and reranker (6→15) inline tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

vector_index: f16 conversion (negative, infinity, denorm, max normal,
roundtrip for various values), dot product (zeros, single, negative,
exact 8-lane), writer dimension mismatch, write_ftvi_vec errors/empty,
FtviIndex bad version/truncated data, search k=0/k>count/ordering,
FtviRecord/FtviIndex Debug/Clone traits.

reranker: RerankError Display/Debug for all variants, ScoredDoc
Debug/Clone, PassthroughReranker single doc/order preservation/large
batch/special char text content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
